# Recovery or uninstall problem

## Which flow failed?

- [ ] Recovery code display
- [ ] Password reset with recovery code
- [ ] Emergency cooldown
- [ ] Uninstall while protection is off
- [ ] Uninstall while protection is on
- [ ] Uninstall during commitment

## What happened?

Describe the exact message or behavior.

## Diagnostics

Paste the output of:

```powershell
.\scripts\doctor.ps1
```

Do not paste your recovery code or password.
